headline: Luxury Brands Rising Above Retail Volatility. What the Ralph Lauren, Tapestry, and Williams-Sonoma Charts Show.
summary: Luxury retail stocks have been firm, with shares of  Ralph Lauren Tapestry  and  Williams-Sonoma  leading the space as investors leaned into companies benefiting from resilient demand among higher-income consumers.  When we look at international names we see domestic names outperforming them.

headline: TJX Marmaxx Strength Continues: Can Core Segment Lead Growth?
summary: The TJX Companies' Marmaxx unit posts strong sales and margin gains in fiscal 2026, as broad demand and aggressive expansion plans drive continued growth momentum.

headline: Macy's Advances Tech-Driven Growth With Digital & AI Investments
summary: M leans into AI and digital, with one-third of sales online and more than 35 use cases boosting customer insight, efficiency and growth.

headline: CASY Maintains Strong Inside Sales Growth With Value-Driven Strategy
summary: Casey's inside same-store sales rise 4% y/y in Q3, driven by strong food and beverage demand as its value-focused strategy boosts volume and margins.

headline: Walmart Boosts Growth Playbook With Healthcare, Omnichannel Push
summary: Walmart expands Better Care Services with GLP-1 weight-management support, linking virtual care, nutrition and pharmacy access.
